overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its first meeting after reorganization, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission also heard that a competing balloon event in Marshfield was canceled, potentially increasing attendance at the Weston event.
presiding: Trustee Erling, Chair (elected at this meeting)

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
New business - Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: Trustee Erling was nominated and elected as Chair unanimously. Cushing was nominated for Vice Chair, seconded by Jackson, and approved unanimously. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary unanimously.
Minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved unanimously with a motion and second by Renee.

discussions.item: Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill of 3308 Green Pastures Lane presented on behalf of the Taste and Glow Balloonfest, reporting approximately 11,000-12,000 attendees last year. He announced that the competing Marshfield balloon event was canceled due to permit issues, making theirs the sole hot air balloon event in the area. A commissioner questioned room tracking, noting the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year. The commission approved a $5,000 grant (same as last year) unanimously, with direction to provide better room usage data from hotels in their post-event report.

Renee reported on attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar, describing meeting the candidates and noting that Anastasia won the competition. She emphasized that the candidates were impressed with what Marathon County had to offer and this was the first time the event was hosted in Marathon County since the 1970s.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest for their annual event
Taste and Glow Balloonfest directed to obtain and report accurate hotel room usage data from hotels in their post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM (tentative)
title: Tourism Commission
